puzzle.hint: A natural phenomenon mentioned in the Quran that brings rain and shade
puzzle.arabicVerse: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُرِيكُمُ ٱلْبَرْقَ خَوْفًۭا وَطَمَعًۭا وَيُنشِئُ ٱلسَّحَابَ ٱلثِّقَالَ
puzzle.verse: 13:12 — It is He who shows you lightning, [causing] fear and aspiration, and generates the heavy clouds.
